best_cell.verdict: WEAK/FRAGILE — clears all 5 gates but ONLY at premium_stop=-0.08 (stops clearing at this strike: [-0.08]); the edge is the tight -8% stop cutting losers, not the time-of-day signal. Thin expectancy (+$7.1/3-lot ~ +$2.37/contract). NOT ship-grade.

DISCLOSURE.authority: real OPRA fills (C1) — supersedes any SPY-direction proxy
DISCLOSURE.metric: per-trade EXPECTANCY (avg_pnl) reported, not WR alone (OP-14)
DISCLOSURE.published_prior: GHLZ 1993-2013 R^2=1.6%/2.6%; BUT QuantConnect OOS replication on SPY 2015-2020 = NEGATIVE Sharpe -0.628. Base rate going in is UNFAVORABLE for the modern regime.
DISCLOSURE.stop_robustness: reported cell clears at stops [-0.08] (>=2 needed to be called stop-robust; otherwise the edge is the stop, not the signal)
DISCLOSURE.anti_cherry_pick_2_10: ALL 40 cells scored against the full 5-gate bar; the reported cell is the best OOS-per-trade among bar-CLEARING cells (or strongest IS cell if none clear). A cell that clears only at one stop setting is flagged WEAK/FRAGILE, not CANDIDATE.
DISCLOSURE.adaptation_caveat: paper holds 15:30->16:00 flat; we route the signal through the v15 0DTE single-leg engine (entry ~15:35, 15:50 hard time-stop = the EOD hold, chart/TP1/ribbon exits active). Strike/theta of a 0DTE leg in the last 25 min is a far harsher test than the paper's index drift.
